package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "sort"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for append_then_sort_each_iteration: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Slice sorting observed inside loops — often cheaper to sort once after the loop.
type CaseAppendThenSortEachIterationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseAppendThenSortEachIterationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseAppendThenSortEachIterationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseAppendThenSortEachIterationModel
}

type CaseAppendThenSortEachIterationService struct {
    repo *CaseAppendThenSortEachIterationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseAppendThenSortEachIterationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeAppendThenSortEachIteration(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseAppendThenSortEachIterationDTO) error {
    focus := "append_then_sort_each_iteration"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    sort.Slice(items, func(i, j int) bool { return items[i].ID < items[j].ID })
    copied := make([]CaseAppendThenSortEachIterationDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    append_then_sort_each_iteration_negative := map[string]int{"append": 1, "then": 2, "sort": 3, "each": 4, "iteration": 5}
    append_then_sort_each_iteration_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    append_negative_0 := append_then_sort_each_iteration_negative["append"] + len(input)
    _ = append_negative_0
    then_negative_1 := append_then_sort_each_iteration_negative["then"] + len(input)
    _ = then_negative_1
    sort_negative_2 := append_then_sort_each_iteration_negative["sort"] + len(input)
    _ = sort_negative_2
    each_negative_3 := append_then_sort_each_iteration_negative["each"] + len(input)
    _ = each_negative_3
    for iteration_negative_4Index, item := range items { append_then_sort_each_iteration_negative[item.ID] = iteration_negative_4Index }
    return nil
}
